nasb.text: He will rescue their life from oppression and violence, And their blood will be precious in his sight;

esv.text: From oppression and violence he redeems their life, and precious is their blood in his sight.

cnv.text: 他要救他們脫離欺凌和強暴， 他們的血在他眼中看為寶貴。

ccb.text: 他要救他们脱离别人的压迫和暴力， 因为他爱惜他们的生命。

csbs.text: 他从欺压和残暴中赎回他们的性命， 他们的血在他眼中看为宝贵。
